8.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to a compilation error. Use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; using it may cause compilation errors or warnings with modern compilers.]

57.reason: [This 'else' only pairs with the last 'if' (digit check), not the entire group of type checks. Thus, if the '-' is between letters but fails digit check, it incorrectly prints '-', even when letter expansion should occur. Logic error in control flow.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This 'else' only pairs with the last 'if' (digit check), not the entire group of type checks. Thus, if the '-' is between letters but fails digit check, it incorrectly prints '-', even when letter expansion should occur. Logic error in control flow.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This else only pairs with the last if (digit case), not all three type checks; should output '-' when none of the valid expansion conditions are met, but currently misses cases where e.g., lowercase condition fails but digit condition also fails]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This 'else' only pairs with the last 'if' (digit case), not all three type checks. Thus, if the '-' is between letters but doesn't meet conditions, it may incorrectly print '-' even when it shouldn't, or skip printing '-' in mixed cases. However, the primary compilation error is due to 'gets'.]
